title: Marketplace Manager - Hopscotch International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Hopscotch International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Hopscotch International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hopscotch International Enterprises:
Hopscotch International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch International Enterprises!
